message:
chore(beads): add issue tracking beads for follow-up work

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,5 @@
 {"id":"bd-10de","title":"demo_showcase tests: compile coverage for --bin demo_showcase","description":"# demo_showcase Tests — Compile Coverage for `--bin demo_showcase`

## Purpose

The demo is a flagship deliverable. It must not silently stop compiling.

This bead adds automated compile coverage so CI will fail if the binary breaks.

## Implementation

Prefer modifying existing test infrastructure instead of adding new test files:

- Update `tests/examples_compile.rs` to also run:
  - `cargo build --all-features --bin demo_showcase`

Optionally also validate that it links under `--release` in a separate (slower) job, but the core requirement is debug build coverage.

## Acceptance Notes

- `cargo test` runs the compile coverage test.
- Breaking the demo binary fails CI quickly with useful stderr.","acceptance_criteria":"Checklist:
- A test builds the binary with `cargo build --all-features --bin demo_showcase`.
- On failure, the test prints the cargo stderr so CI logs are actionable.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:29:06.059756038Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T03:15:00.236689287Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T03:15:00.236613225Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-10de","depends_on_id":"bd-383","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-01T04:32:38Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-10de","depends_on_id":"bd-z1b","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T04:32:38Z","created_by":"import"}]}

 {"id":"bd-1262","title":"Implement resolve_bidi(text) - BiDi text resolution","description":"# Task: Implement resolve_bidi()

## Function Signature (Rust)
```rust
pub fn resolve_bidi(text: &str) -> BidiInfo
```

## Purpose
Resolves bidirectional text according to UAX #9 (Unicode BiDi Algorithm). Essential for proper display of Arabic, Hebrew, and mixed LTR/RTL text.

## BidiInfo Type
```rust
pub struct BidiInfo {
    pub base_direction: Direction,
    pub levels: Vec<u8>,  // Embedding level per char
}

pub enum Direction {
    Ltr,
    Rtl,
    Neutral,
}
```

## Implementation Notes
- Consider using unicode-bidi crate
- Complex algorithm with multiple phases
- Need to handle isolates, overrides, marks

## Zig Reference
Section 8 of EXISTING_OPENTUI_STRUCTURE.md covers BiDi support

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] BidiInfo struct defined
- [ ] Correct level resolution
- [ ] Handles mixed scripts
- [ ] Handles explicit controls

## Testing
- Pure LTR text
- Pure RTL text
- Mixed LTR/RTL
- Explicit controls (LRO, RLO, etc.)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T15:34:29.978324396Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-31T03:01:32.939900890Z","closed_at":"2026-01-31T03:01:32.939836741Z","close_reason":"Already implemented in src/unicode/bidi.rs (BidiInfo/Direction + resolve_bidi + tests incl explicit controls); verified fmt/clippy/test pass","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1262","depends_on_id":"bd-2oof","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-01T04:32:38Z","created_by":"import"}]}

This is intentional but could be better documented. Tasks: 1) Add doc comment warning to render_to() about placeholder behavior, 2) Add doc comment to render_to_with_pool() explaining when to use it, 3) Consider adding example in module docs","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T17:40:09.094777229Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T17:42:05.554193601Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T17:42:05.554130183Z","close_reason":"Documentation improved in eaf58ab","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-1303","title":"Renderer tests: Terminal control and capabilities","description":"# Renderer Terminal Control & Capabilities Tests

## Scope
Test terminal control functions and capability access.

## Functions to Test
1. `set_cursor(x, y)` - Cursor positioning
2. `set_cursor_style(style)` - Cursor appearance
3. `set_title(title)` - Window title
4. `set_background(color)` - Default background
5. `capabilities()` - Terminal capabilities (immutable)
6. `capabilities_mut()` - Terminal capabilities (mutable)

## Test Cases

### set_cursor()
- [ ] Emits correct ANSI sequence
- [ ] Clamps to buffer bounds
- [ ] Works with 0,0 origin

### set_cursor_style()
- [ ] Block style sequence
- [ ] Underline style sequence
- [ ] Bar style sequence
- [ ] Blinking variants

### set_title()
- [ ] Emits OSC 2 sequence
- [ ] Handles special characters
- [ ] Empty title allowed

### set_background()
- [ ] Updates default background color
- [ ] clear() uses new background
- [ ] Present uses new background for transparent cells

### capabilities()
- [ ] Returns immutable reference
- [ ] Reflects detected terminal capabilities
- [ ] Color support level correct
- [ ] Hyperlink support detected

### capabilities_mut()
- [ ] Returns mutable reference
- [ ] Changes affect rendering
- [ ] Can override detected capabilities","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-28T19:14:59.467804583Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T21:32:21.959459703Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T21:32:21.959393320Z","close_reason":"Added 12 terminal control & capabilities tests: set_cursor visible/hidden/origin/boundary, set_cursor_style (block/underline/bar with blinking variants), set_title (basic/empty/special chars/unicode), capabilities read/override/persist. All 95 renderer tests pass.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["renderer","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1303","depends_on_id":"bd-2e6f","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-01T04:32:38Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-1303","depends_on_id":"bd-d1p0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T04:32:38Z","created_by":"import"}]}
